creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


Configure failed, some more bits of QT4 are needed: 

**** The following problems have been detected by configure. 
**** Please check the messages below before running 'make'. 
**** (see the section 'Problems' in the INSTALL file) 

** moc 4 binary not found ! 

** uic 4 binary not found ! 


===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly. 

Full log available at 
<https://graf.pompo.net/tb/errors/6-FreeBSD/lyx-1.5.1.log>. 

Please note that it will require a repocopy from lyx. 

Regards, 
--  
Th. Thomas.
